name: Vegetable Stock
recipeIngredient: 1 cup diced celery, plus some inner leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a bit of water in a large pot over medium heat. Add the chopped onions and sauté until softened, about 5-7 minutes.
2. Add all the remaining ingredients (except water) to the pot. Pour enough cold water into the pot to cover the vegetables by about an inch.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat. Once boiling, reduce the heat to low and simmer uncovered for 30 minutes to 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally. The longer it simmers, the more flavorful the stock will be.
4. Remove the pot from the heat. Use a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth to strain the broth into a clean container, pressing on the solids with a spoon to extract as much liquid as possible.
5. Discard the solids and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
